Three pasture fields have areas of $10/3$, $10$ and $24$ acres, respectively.
The fields initially are covered with grass of the same thickness and new grass
grows on each at the same rate per acre. If $12$ cows eat the first field bare
in $4$ weeks and $21$ cows eat the second field bare in $9$ weeks, how many
cows will eat the third field bare in $18$ weeks? Assume that all cows eat at
the same rate. (From {\it Math Can be Fun} by Ya Perelman.)
